chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P. No. D – 869 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 26.08.2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Since the Provincial Government of Sindh has promulgated the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances (Amendment) Act, 2025, by amending the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances Act, 2024 through the Sindh Government Gazette published on 18.08.2025, whereby the petitioner has been given appropriate forum for bail, therefore, this petition has become infructuous. In view of the above, instant petition is disposed of, leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the appropriate forum / Special Court / Court of Sessions Judge, having jurisdiction. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
